Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Jepsen: MariaDB Galera Cluster 12.1.2 55 upvotes, 5 comments
  2. Claude Tips for 3D Work 51 upvotes, 5 comments
  3. In space, no one can hear you kernel panic (2020) 57 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Leanstral: Open-source agent for trustworthy coding and formal proof engineering 432 upvotes, 89 comments
  5. Sci-Fi Short Film "There Is No Antimemetics Division" [video] 47 upvotes, 5 comments
  6. Kagi Translate now supports LinkedIn Speak as an output language 346 upvotes, 89 comments
  7. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 360 upvotes, 103 comments
  8. Monkey Island for Commodore 64 Ground Up 87 upvotes, 21 comments
  9. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 189 upvotes, 56 comments
  10. The unlikely story of Teardown Multiplayer 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 381 upvotes, 163 comments
  12. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 409 upvotes, 178 comments
  13. Gitana 18: the new flying Ultim trimaran 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  14. Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs 238 upvotes, 108 comments
  15. Why I love FreeBSD 409 upvotes, 197 comments
  16. Every layer of review makes you 10x slower 150 upvotes, 64 comments
  17. Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI 68 upvotes, 25 comments
  18. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 540 upvotes, 292 comments
  19. Language model teams as distributed systems 89 upvotes, 39 comments
  20. Pyodide: a Python distribution based on WebAssembly 50 upvotes, 19 comments
  21. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 1446 upvotes, 927 comments
  22. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 97 upvotes, 50 comments
  23. Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games 234 upvotes, 140 comments
  24. Speed at the cost of quality: Study of use of Cursor AI in open source projects (2025) 103 upvotes, 58 comments
  25. Starlink Mini as a failover 245 upvotes, 184 comments
  26. The American Healthcare Conundrum 320 upvotes, 275 comments
  27. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 123 upvotes, 146 comments
  28. AirPods Max 2 265 upvotes, 446 comments
  29. Beyond has dropped “meat” from its name and expanded its high-protein drink line 111 upvotes, 196 comments
  30. AnswerThis (YC F25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
